name: Kazan Delicacies MCP
description: Model Context Protocol server for the halal meat catalog of Kazan Delicacies (Казанские Деликатесы). 72 SKUs, live prices in 7 currencies, halal cert #614A/2024.

streamable_http.description: Remote MCP (Streamable HTTP, stateless). Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients.

sse.description: Legacy SSE transport for clients that connect via a dedicated /sse URL (e.g. Grok custom connectors).

stdio.description: Local stdio server — clone repo, npm install, run from project root.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search catalog by name, category, SKU, or meat type

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Full product card by SKU with prices and images

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.description: Live catalog with optional filters and b2b metadata

tools.name: get_certification
tools.description: Halal cert, HACCP, ISO 22000 link, safety guarantees

tools.name: get_delivery_info
tools.description: EXW Kazan terms, currencies, export markets, HS codes

tools.name: submit_inquiry
tools.description: Send B2B wholesale/export inquiry to sales team
